zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Prouse於1512年出生在英國戴文哈福德時，她的父親Lawrence Prouse32歲，母親Agnes Cole30歲。她於1532年與John Trowbridge在英國英格蘭戴文哈福德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1572年在她的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在英國戴文哈福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Prouse于1512年出生在英国戴文哈福德时，她的父亲Lawrence Prouse32岁，母亲Agnes Cole30岁。她于1532年与John Trowbridge在英国英格兰戴文哈福德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1572年在她的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在英国戴文哈福德。

nameMeanings.name: Prouse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Preuss  .
Americanized form of German Brause 2, a nickname for a violent, stormy person, from Middle High German brūs ‘noise, storm’.

variants.name: Prowse
meanings: English (Devon and Cornwall): nickname from Middle English prous, prus, variant forms of prou ‘brave, valiant, proud’ (see Prue ).
English (Devon and Cornwall): ethnic name: from Middle English Prus(se), Pruce ‘Prussia, Prussian’, for someone from that region. Compare Sprouse .
Americanized form of German   Prause   or   Praus  , or perhaps of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Prouse was born in 1512, in Chagford, Devon, England, her father, Lawrence Prouse, was 32 and her mother, Agnes Cole, was 30. She married John Trowbridge in 1532, in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1572, in her hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Chagford, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Prouse est née en 1512, à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Lawrence Prouse, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Agnes Cole, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé John Trowbridge en 1532, à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1572, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Prouse 1512 in Chagford, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lawrence Prouse 32 und ihre Mutter Agnes Cole 30. Sie hat 1532 in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom John Trowbridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1572 im Alter von 60 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Chagford, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Prouse è nata il nel 1512 nel Chagford, Devon, England, sua padre, Lawrence Prouse, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Agnes Cole, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato John Trowbridge nel 1532, nel Chagford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1572, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Chagford, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Prouseが1512年にイギリスデボンチャグフォードで生まれた時，父Lawrence Prouseは32歳，母Agnes Coleは30歳であった。1532年にイギリスイギリスデボンチャグフォードでJohn Trowbridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1572年に故郷で60歳で死去し，イギリスデボンチャグフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Prouse(이)가 1512년 영국 데폰 차그퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lawrence Prouse(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Cole(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1532년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 차그퍼드에서 John Trowbridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1572년 그녀의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 차그퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Prouse nasceu em 1512, em Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lawrence Prouse, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Cole, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com John Trowbridge em 1532, em Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1572, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Prouse родилась в 1512 г. в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Lawrence Prouse было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Cole, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Trowbridge в 1532 г. в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1572 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Prouse nació en 1512, en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Lawrence Prouse, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Agnes Cole, tenía 30 años. Se casó con John Trowbridge en 1532, en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1572, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra.
